'''Bethrogg''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. Sometime prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Bethrogg commanded the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial star destroyer]] [[Behemoth (Imperial-class)|''Behemoth'']] and spearheaded [[Operation Venom]], a military operation aimed at eliminating the [[Pegasus Strike Force]], an element of the Rebel fleet, which was active in the Mid Rim.<ref name="TP">{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}</ref>

{{Char-stub}}
